meaning: n.事实,实际,实情,真相,(犯罪)行为,论据
examples: Her argument was grounded in fact.
That was a conjecture, not a fact.
But was it, in fact, a hideous goof?
In fact, I think you can be a far better and more successful businessperson.
The former Motorola engineer Marty Cooper, in fact, made the first-ever wireless phone call in 1973.
